featured.title: Introducing VS Code Agents companion app
featured.description: A new companion app optimized for agent-native development, running alongside VS Code Insiders. Run multiple agents simultaneously, across multiple repos. No extra installation needed.

highlights.title: Agents for real-world development
highlights.description: From enforcing policies with hooks to guiding agents mid-response, validating UI features with integrated browser tools, and bringing structured skills directly into the editor.

highlights.title: AI core concepts
highlights.description: Get an overview of the core concepts and how AI agents work in VS Code.

highlights.title: Build and test with browser agent tools
highlights.description: Let AI build web apps and automatically verify them in the integrated browser, catching and fixing bugs on its own.
